Angelo, unfortunately, targets you as his #1 bully victim. Why? He secretly likes you. Angelo is part of the popular fraternity, Rho Omicron. If you like a tatted dreadhead bully, maybe this one's for you. Maybe a bit of a nonchalant dreadhead lmao.
